steps.title: Use the narrator's amusement
steps.content: The narrator goes to the bus stop to watch people on gym machines, calls the scene funny, and jokingly turns it into a show. The passage centers on this activity and the narrator's reaction to it.

steps.title: Reject invented purposes
steps.content: A mistakes the joke for an actual movie in a theater. B adds excitement about school, and D adds a problem the narrator overcame; neither appears in the passage. The answer is C.
